g.text: D2 - Physical | Project gap-genai-discovery | Region us-central1 | Env POC

p.strong: Authorized view (read surface for the agent):

ul.li: v_experiment_kpis = experiments JOIN experiment_clusters Agent sees only this view; raw tables are hidden behind the view's authorized grant.

div.p: Operational telemetry (request_logs, skill_invocations, traces, latency, llm_tokens_in/out) lives in the Cloud Observability Suite, not BQ.

ul.li:
sa-agent -> DE.user, AIP.user, mcp.toolUser, BQ.jobUser, BQ.dataViewer on v_experiment_kpis (view only), BQ.dataEditor on feedback (writes only)
IAM deny policy on read-write MCP tools
